prompt: I have a Rust project. The architecture assessment is at ASSESSMENT_CIRCULAR.md. Please scaffold the new architecture following this assessment exactly.

assertions.description: Explicitly identifies the circular dependency between task_service and project_service
Proposes a concrete fix (e.g., extract shared query module, dependency inversion)
Flags the issue as an architectural problem rather than silently making it compile
Resolves the cycle BEFORE writing the skeleton (Phase 1), not after
